case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. DEYSII MATAMOROS RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DEYSII MATAMOROS RODRIGUEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, DEYSII MATAMOROS $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,305.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, DEYSII MATAMOROS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, DEYSII MATAMOROS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES COURT COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DEYSII MATAMOROS RODRIGUEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.
